title: I Ran the Fix CLI on 10 F-Grade MCP Servers. Here's the Before/After.
bsky_text:
ran the fix CLI on 10 F-grade MCP schemas.

notion: all 22 tools renamed from camelCase to snake_case in 0.2s. grade: F → D-.
context7: still F after fix. the problem is behavioral text, not naming.

automated fixes have a ceiling. {url}
